title: neltuma alpataco var. alpataco
intro: Neltuma alpataco var. alpataco, also known as Neltuma or Neltuma alpataco, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to Ecuador. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neltuma alpataco var. alpataco include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and skin conditions.
